name: UPSIDE THE BACKROOMS
short_description: Upside The Backrooms is a game created by the , in which you find yourself in yellow rooms with the sound of constant light. You must try to survive for 18 minutes.
detailed_description:
DESCRIPTION
Upside The Backrooms is a horror game where you noclip across the earth landing in scary yellow rooms, from which you must survive.

LEVELS
Upside The Backrooms has 1 level for the moment: the first is the "Lobby".

HOW TO SURVIVE
You need to collect and use the anti-depressants you find in the area to survive longer before you die.

DEVELOPMENT ROADMAP
We're still working on our game, both for optimization and for new features.
So the game won't be empty, but will continue to evolve.
